post.summary:
Register Shop Owner

Registers a new shop owner (merchant) account with store details. This endpoint handles the complete
merchant registration workflow including email verification token generation and merchant creation event publishing.
post.description:
This endpoint:
         - Validates email uniqueness before registration
         - Automatically assigns the STORE_OWNER role
         - Creates a new tenant (store) associated with the user
         - Generates an email verification token (random digit format)
         - Constructs a verification URL with token and email
         - Sends a welcome email with verification details
         - Publishes a MerchantCreatedEvent for event-driven processing
         - Skips tenant context validation as registration is tenant-independent
         - Email verification is mandatory before full account activation

post.summary:
Login User (Shop Owner/Merchant)

Authenticates a shop owner or merchant user using email and password credentials. Upon successful authentication,
generates a JWT token for subsequent API calls and returns the authenticated user's details.
post.description:
This endpoint:
         - Uses email and password for credential validation
         - Generates a JWT token with user identity and roles embedded
         - Token is valid for the configured expiration duration (typically 24 hours or per configuration)
         - X-Session-Id header is optional and used for tracking login events
         - Skips tenant context validation as login is tenant-independent
         - Returned token must be included in Authorization header for subsequent API calls
         - Password hashing verification is performed server-side for security

parameters.description:
Optional session identifier header (X-Session-Id) for tracking login events and session management.
                 If not provided, login proceeds without explicit session tracking.
parameters.name: X-Session-Id

post.summary:
Login Customer

Authenticates a customer user using email and password credentials. Upon successful authentication, generates a JWT token
for API access and returns the customer's profile information. Also publishes a customer login event for tracking and analytics.
post.description:
This endpoint:
         - Authenticates customer in the context of current tenant/store
         - Generates JWT token specific to customer identity and permissions
         - Returns complete customer profile including preferences, account type, and status
         - X-Session-Id header enables customer login event publishing for tracking and audit logs
         - Token expiration is returned in milliseconds for client-side token refresh logic
         - Publishes CustomerLoginEvent only if sessionId is provided and tenant is valid
         - Customer must belong to the current tenant context for successful authentication
         - Requires active tenant context (unlike shop owner login which skips tenant check)

parameters.description:
Optional session identifier header (X-Session-Id) for tracking customer login events and session correlation.
                 If provided along with valid tenant, publishes CustomerLoginEvent for event-driven processing.
parameters.name: X-Session-Id

post.description: A One Time Password is sent to user whatsapp number to verify their identity
This API creates a new promotional ad.

get.description:
This API retrieves a list of promotional ads filtered by status and paginated using a cursor.
The response includes promotional ads in either DRAFT or PUBLISHED status.

get.description: This API retrieves a specific promotional ad by its ID.

delete.description: This API deletes a specific promotional ad.

get.description:
This API retrieves a list of published promotional ads.
The response includes promotional ads in PUBLISHED status.

patch.description:
This API updates the status of a specific promotional ad.
The response includes promotional ads in PUBLISHED status.

get.summary:
Fetch Customer Orders.
This API retrieves a list of orders for the authenticated customer.
The response includes orders in PUBLISHED status.

parameters.description: Search by order number (exact match) - This is a separate field to allow for precise filtering by order number, while the 'search' field can be used for more general text search across multiple fields (like order number and customer name).
parameters.name: orderNumber

parameters.description: General search text for order number or customer name - This field allows for a broader search that can match either the order number or the customer's name, providing more flexibility in filtering orders based on user input.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by product ID (orders that contain a specific product)
parameters.name: productId

get.summary:
Fetch Customer Orders.
This API retrieves a list of orders for a specific customer.

parameters.description: Search by order number (exact match) - This is a separate field to allow for precise filtering by order number, while the 'search' field can be used for more general text search across multiple fields (like order number and customer name).
parameters.name: orderNumber

parameters.description: General search text for order number or customer name - This field allows for a broader search that can match either the order number or the customer's name, providing more flexibility in filtering orders based on user input.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by product ID (orders that contain a specific product)
parameters.name: productId

Fetch Order Items.
This API retrieves a list of items in a specific order.

parameters.description: Filter promotions by specific end date

get.description: This API returns the merchant profile.
This API returns the merchant business profile.

Retrieves all product reviews in the merchant's store with optional filtering. Shop owners use this to monitor
customer feedback, identify problematic reviews, and manage reputation.

Retrieves all reviews for a specific product. Reviews are filtered by status (active, hidden, or pending)
to display only appropriate reviews on product detail pages.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product to retrieve reviews for.
parameters.name: productId

parameters.description:
Review status filter: "active" (published), "hidden" (removed from display), or "pending" (awaiting moderation).
             Default is "active" to show only published reviews.
parameters.name: status

post.description:
Submits a new product review from a customer. Reviews include rating, comment, and reviewer name.
System validates one review per customer per product and performs moderation checks.

delete.description:
This endpoint:
         - Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
         - Requires Authorization header (@RequireAuthorizationHeader)
         - Permanently removes review from system (no recovery possible)
         - Review is removed from all product displays
         - Useful for removing reviews with false claims, spam, or offensive content
         - Use hideReview instead if you want to temporarily remove review

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the review to delete.
parameters.name: reviewId

patch.description:
Hides a review from public display temporarily. Hidden reviews no longer appear on product pages
but remain in system for audit purposes. Reviews can be unhidden if needed (soft deletion).

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the review to hide.
parameters.name: reviewId

post.description: This API adds the bank details of the tenant.

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of customers for a shop owner with advanced pagination support using cursor-based
navigation. Supports filtering by search term, registration date range, account status, and account type.

parameters.description:
Optional cursor token from previous response for cursor-based pagination. If not provided,
             starts from beginning of results.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Maximum number of customers per page. Validated to maximum of 20 records per security policy.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Page number for offset-based pagination (zero-based). Default is 0.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Field to sort by (CREATED_AT, NAME, EMAIL, STATUS, etc.). Default is CREATED_AT.
parameters.name: sortFieldParam

parameters.description: Sort direction: "ASC" or "DESC". Default is DESC (newest first).
parameters.name: sortDirectionParam

get.description:
This endpoint:
         - Requires customer authentication (implicit from SecurityContextHolder)
         - No path parameters required - uses authenticated user from JWT token
         - Returns customer's own profile data only (privacy-protected)
         - CustomerMapper transforms entity to DTO with all profile fields
         - Useful for profile display pages in customer dashboard

This endpoint:
         - Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
         - Allows merchants to view customer details for order fulfillment and customer service
         - Returns full customer profile including registration date, contact, account status
         - CustomerMapper includes all customer information in response

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the customer to retrieve.
parameters.name: customerId

patch.description:
Deactivates a customer account, preventing further login and transactions. The account remains in the system
for historical and audit purposes but becomes inactive. Account can be reactivated if needed.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the customer account to deactivate.
parameters.name: customerId

patch.description:
Reactivates a previously deactivated customer account. Once reactivated, customer can log in and place orders again.
Account retains all historical data and order history.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the customer account to activate.
parameters.name: customerId

post.description:
Registers a new customer account in the current store/tenant. Validates email uniqueness, creates customer record,
and returns customer profile with confirmation of successful registration.

patch.description:
Updates the authenticated customer's profile information. Customer can modify personal details,
contact information, preferences, and other account settings.

post.description: This API registers a new customer.
This API registers a new customer via google.

post.summary:
Login Customer Via Google.
This API logs in a customer via google.

get.summary:
Get All Orders

Retrieves a paginated and filtered list of orders for an authenticated shop owner. Supports sorting by various
fields, pagination, and multiple filtering criteria including search terms, order status, payment status, amount ranges,
and date ranges.
get.description:
This endpoint:
         - Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
         - Retrieves orders for current authenticated tenant/merchant
         - Converts strongly-typed OrderQueryRequest to Map for service layer compatibility
         - Supports dynamic filtering: search (order number, customer), status, paymentStatus, amount range, date range
         - Default sorting by ORDER_DATE in descending order (newest first)
         - Response includes pagination metadata for client-side navigation
         - OrderMapper converts entity objects to DTOs with necessary fields only
         - Useful for order management dashboards and reporting

parameters.description: Zero-based page number for pagination. Default is 0 (first page).
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Maximum number of records per page. Default is 100, adjustable for performance.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Field name to sort results by (ORDER_DATE, CREATED_AT, ORDER_AMOUNT, etc.). Default is ORDER_DATE.
parameters.name: sortField

parameters.description: Sort direction: "ASC" for ascending or "DESC" for descending. Default is DESC.
parameters.name: sortDir

parameters.description: Search by order number (exact match) - This is a separate field to allow for precise filtering by order number, while the 'search' field can be used for more general text search across multiple fields (like order number and customer name).
parameters.name: orderNumber

parameters.description: General search text for order number or customer name - This field allows for a broader search that can match either the order number or the customer's name, providing more flexibility in filtering orders based on user input.
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Filter by product ID (orders that contain a specific product)
parameters.name: productId

get.summary:
Get Order by Order Number

Retrieves a single order by its order number. Order number is visible to both customers and merchants,
providing a human-readable alternative to internal order IDs.
get.description:
This endpoint:
         - Accessible without shop owner restriction (visible to customers and admins)
         - Retrieves order for current tenant context
         - Returns complete order information including contact details
         - Useful for order tracking pages where customer provides order number
         - OrderMapper includes all relevant order details in response

parameters.description:
The unique order number (e.g., "ORD-20260308-001") assigned at order creation.
                  Visible in customer receipts and emails.
parameters.name: orderNumber

get.summary:
Get Order Detail for Merchant

Retrieves complete order details including all associated order line items for a shop owner. Provides
comprehensive view necessary for order fulfillment, including item quantities, prices, and variants.
get.description:
This endpoint:
         - Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
         - Retrieves complete order including all line items
         - OrderLineMapper includes product details, quantities, unit prices, and discounts
         - Essential for order fulfillment workflow
         - Returns detailed information not included in list view

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order. Must belong to the authenticated merchant's tenant.
parameters.name: orderId

get.summary:
Get Order Line Items

Retrieves all line items (products) associated with a specific order. Each line item includes
product details, variant information, quantity ordered, and pricing.
get.description:
This endpoint:
         - Restricted to shop owner access only (@ShopOwnerAccess)
         - Returns only items/line items, not order summary
         - OrderLineMapper includes detailed product information and variant selections
         - Useful for constructing packing slips or generating invoices
         - Separating items retrieval allows efficient data loading patterns

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order. Must belong to the authenticated merchant's tenant.
parameters.name: orderId

patch.description:
Updates the current status of an order to reflect fulfillment progress. Valid status transitions are enforced
to prevent invalid workflow progressions. Records an audit trail entry capturing who changed the status and why.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to update. Must belong to authenticated merchant's tenant.
parameters.name: orderId

patch.summary:
Force Update Order Status (Admin Override)

Bypasses all standard transition rules and forcibly sets the order to the given status.
Use with caution — this is intended for administrative corrections only (e.g., stuck orders,
data recovery, third-party sync discrepancies).

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to update.
parameters.name: orderId

get.description:
Retrieves comprehensive order statistics for a merchant including order count, total revenue, average order value,
orders by status breakdown, and other aggregated metrics useful for business insights and dashboards.

post.summary: Send a template message to initiate or re-establish a connection.

patch.description: This API changes the password of an authenticated customer.
This API changes the password of an authenticated merchant.

This API resets the merchant password.

Creates a new product in the merchant's store (tenant). Validates product details including brand, color,
and category associations. Specifications are validated against tenant-specific configuration. Product is
immediately published upon creation unless status is set to INACTIVE.

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of products with optional filtering and sorting. Supports filtering by search term,
category, brand, color, price range, stock status, and customer rating. Results are returned in pages for efficient
data loading and display.

parameters.description: Zero-based page number for pagination. Default is 0 (first page). Must be >= 0.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Maximum number of products per page. Default is 100, adjustable for performance.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Field to sort by (CREATED_AT, NAME, PRICE, RATING, etc.). Default is CREATED_AT.
parameters.name: sortFieldParam

parameters.description: Sort direction: "ASC" for ascending or "DESC" for descending. Default is DESC.
parameters.name: sortDirectionParam

patch.description:
Updates an existing product's details. Allows modification of product information including name, description,
pricing, status, and specifications. Only merchant who owns the product can update it.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product to update. Must belong to authenticated merchant's tenant.
parameters.name: productId

get.description:
Retrieves complete details of a single product including all attributes, specifications, pricing,
availability, and related information.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product. Must belong to current tenant context.
parameters.name: productId

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a product from the merchant's store. Product details are removed from system but
historical order records remain intact for audit purposes.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product to delete. Must belong to authenticated merchant's tenant.
parameters.name: productId

get.description:
Retrieves a list of products similar to a specified product, typically from the same category or with
related attributes. Useful for "You might also like" or "Related products" sections in product detail pages.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the reference product. Must belong to current tenant.
parameters.name: productId

parameters.description: Maximum number of similar products to return. Default is 4, adjustable based on UI requirements.
parameters.name: limit

get.summary:
Get Product Rating

Retrieves the average customer rating for a product calculated from all customer reviews.
Rating provides social proof and helps customers make purchase decisions.
get.description:
This endpoint:
         - Public endpoint (no authentication required)
         - Computes average rating from all published customer reviews
         - Rating range is typically 1.0 to 5.0 stars
         - Returns 0.0 if product has no reviews yet
         - Used in product listings and detail pages to display customer sentiment
         - Computation is cached or aggregated query for performance

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product. Must belong to current tenant.
parameters.name: productId

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of payments for a tenant with cursor-based navigation.

parameters.description: Maximum number of records per page.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Sort direction: "ASC" or "DESC". Default is DESC.
parameters.name: sortDirectionParam

get.description: Retrieves the payment details associated with a specific order.

post.description:
Initializes a payment transaction for an authenticated customer's order. Validates the requested payment gateway
and method, ensures the merchant has configured the payment gateway, creates a payment record, and initiates
the payment processing with the external payment gateway.

Initializes a payment transaction for a guest (unauthenticated) customer's order.
Performs same validation as customer payment initialization but without requiring user authentication.
Guest payment includes currency validation and creates a guest-friendly payment record.

Verifies payment completion with the external payment gateway using the payment reference. Confirms the payment
amount, currency, and status, updates the payment record with gateway verification details, and triggers order status
progression to PROCESSING. Also sends notification emails to merchant.

parameters.description:
Optional session identifier for tracking payment
                 confirmation events and audit logs.
parameters.name: X-Session-Id

patch.description:
Updates the payment status for a specific payment record. Used by shop owners
to manually confirm or adjust
payment status, particularly for offline or manual payment methods. Records
status transition history and
updates associated order status accordingly.

parameters.description:
Unique identifier of the payment record to
                                  update. Must belong to current tenant.
parameters.name: paymentId
